mapper.insert: insert into wf_task (id, process_def_id, instance_id, task_def_id, display_name, task_type, perform_type, operator, create_time, expire_time, parent_task_id, variable, revision) values (#{id}, #{processDefinitionId}, #{instanceId}, #{taskDefinitionId}, #{displayName}, #{taskType}, #{performType}, #{operator}, #{createTime}, #{expireTime}, #{parentTaskId}, #{variable}, #{revision})
mapper.update: update wf_task set operator= #{operator}, variable= #{variable}, expire_time= #{expireTime}, revision = revision + 1 where id = #{id} and revision = #{revision}
mapper.select: select id, process_def_id, instance_id, task_def_id, display_name, task_type, perform_type, operator, create_time, expire_time, parent_task_id, variable, revision from wf_task where id = #{id}

select id, process_def_id, instance_id, task_def_id, display_name, task_type, perform_type, operator, create_time, expire_time, parent_task_id, variable, revision from wf_task where instance_id = #{instanceId}
